dict.string: Outbound tracks your route during activities, even in the background.
Outbound needs your location to track your run.
Outbound tracks your route during activities, even in the background.
Outbound keeps the camera ready so you can capture moments during your run without leaving the app.
Outbound uses the microphone to let your AI coach speak to you during runs.
Outbound uses motion sensors to improve pace and cadence tracking.
Outbound reads heart rate and workout data from Apple Health.
Outbound saves your workouts to Apple Health.
